name: beehiiv-list-premium-tiers
description: Retrieve all premium subscription tiers for a publication, including pricing details (amount, currency, billing interval) and subscriber counts. Use to discover tier IDs needed for subscriber upgrade workflows and to audit your monetization structure.

API_KEY_SECRET.description: Vault path to the Beehiiv API key (e.g. 'beehiiv/api_key').

PUBLICATION_ID.description: Beehiiv publication ID (e.g. 'pub_xxx...'). Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

INCLUDE_PRICES.description: When true (default), expands each tier to include pricing details: amount_cents, currency, billing interval, CTA text, and feature list.

INCLUDE_STATS.description: When true (default), expands each tier to include subscriber count (active_subscriptions).

LIMIT.description: Maximum number of tiers to return (1–100). Most publications have fewer than 10 tiers.

setup_instructions.title: Discover tier IDs for upgrade workflows
setup_instructions.detail: Run this node once to get tier IDs. Copy the 'id' field from the tier you want to use in beehiiv-update-subscriber (TIER / premium_tier_ids).

setup_instructions.title: Revenue structure audit
setup_instructions.detail: Chain: [schedule trigger] → [beehiiv-list-premium-tiers] → [beehiiv-list-subscribers: TIER=premium] → compute revenue = sum(active_subscriptions × amount_cents per tier).
